description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want to configure and manage multiple SAP S/4HANA connector instances across DEV, QAS, and PRD environments so that I can aggregate data from all systems into a unified view for comprehensive reporting and analytics.

**Background**:
Organizations often maintain separate SAP S/4HANA instances for development, quality assurance, and production environments. Supporting multi-system aggregation enables workspace admins to consolidate data pipelines without manual intervention or duplicate configuration efforts.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
1. Workspace admin can create up to 3 distinct SAP S/4 connector instances within a single workspace, each targeting a different environment (DEV, QAS, PRD) with unique connection parameters
2. Each SAP connector instance maintains independent credentials, client ID, and system ID while sharing the same tenant-level data mapping configuration
3. The Connector Health Monitor displays real-time status indicators for all configured SAP instances, allowing the admin to identify connection failures per environment
4. Aggregated data exports include source environment metadata (DEV/QAS/PRD) as a prefix field, enabling downstream systems to trace data lineage back to the originating SAP instance

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Noted. Will need to verify SAP S/4HANA Cloud API rate limits when aggregating across 3 environments simultaneously.
